text.title: Feature Flag Cleanup Discipline Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply Feature Flag Cleanup Discipline end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: inventory
step.input: flag platform export OR codebase grep
step.action: List all flags with name, owner, declared-expiry, current state.

step.name: flag-overdue
step.action: Mark each row overdue / grace / live; for overdue rows, alert the owner.

step.name: plan-cleanup
step.action: Owner writes cleanup ticket: chosen branch (on/off), removal scope, smoke-test plan.

step.name: execute-pr
step.action: Open PR that removes BOTH the flag declaration and the disabled branch; attach metric snapshot.

step.name: verify
step.action: Reviewer runs grep for the flag name; expects 0 hits; attaches grep output.
